items.summary: Replace the existing principal photo used on the Home page with the user’s newly uploaded principal image, ensuring the final asset is a clean, sharp, perfectly square (1:1) 600×600 PNG, centered on the face horizontally with slight natural headroom, framed head-and-shoulders and cropped slightly above the elbows, and saved as frontend/public/assets/generated/principal-photo.dim_600x600.png.
